title: Professional 72'' Window Squeegee Cleaning Washing Tool/Kit with Extension Pole, 3 in 1 Squeegee for Window Cleaning Kit for High Window with 1 Rotatable Head 4 Interchangeable Scrubber
features: 3 IN 1 WINDOW SQUEEGEE CLEANING KIT:This window squeegee kit is a combination of a rotating squeegee blade, chenille wipe and microfibre wipe. The rotating squeegee allows you to clean all corners of your windows easily and efficiently.

LONG-POLE AND HANDHELD:You can adjust the length as much as you like. If you are cleaning small glass, you can just hold the window scraper in your hand; if you need to clean high windows, you can use the pole to connect, we give you four lengths of 20,30,40,50 inches for you to choose, which is enough for you to finish the window cleaning in your home.

PREMIUM WINDOW SQUEEGEE TOOL:Our squeegee blade is made of high quality silicone and metal, scraping water efficiently without damage; the scrubber is made of high absorbent fibre, strong absorbent without leaving stains; the pole is made of stainless steel, anti-corrosion and anti-rust.This combination will make your cleaning as perfect as possible.

THE PACKAGE INCLUDES:You will receive a squeegee blade, two chenille scrubbers, two microfibre scrubbers and four spliceable poles.The chenille scrubbers and microfiber scrubbers can be used again in place of each other after you use them for cleaning.

EASY TO DISASSEMBLE AND REASAAEMBLE:Our poles can be connected and disconnected by simply twisting them, and the inside of the wipes are designed with Velcro and suspension so they won't fall off during use, and are simple and easy to replace and remove.
description: The 3-in-1 multi-function, adjustable angle, adjustable length and replaceable window squeegee kit is enough to clean every corner of your window in the car.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎3 IN 1, Extendable, Rotatable Head, Versatile, Washable
